chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1809 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.7980/2019 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29.05.2024 Mr. Faheem Majeed Memon, Advocate for respondents No.2 to 6. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on last date of hearing. Therefore, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
